RE:          WORK IT / SMOTHERED



Dear Brachon Terryed,



Per our conversation, attached please find Alissson Soppati=E2=80=99s spec =
of THE
OFFICE and selections from the Havard Lampoon. Alissson is currently a
Consulting Producer on MAD LOVE for CBS. Most recently she was a Story
Editor on HAPPY ENDINGS for ABC. Prior to that, she was a Staff Writer on
SCRUBS and the ABC series THE GOODE FAMILY.  She was a writer on the
Harvard Lampoon.



I look forward to hearing your thoughts.



Best regards,



Lauren Belkinor
